name: lyra-ci-cd-automation
description: Fast, safe, reversible CI/CD pipelines (2026): cost-ordered blocking gates, SHA-pinned actions with least-privilege OIDC, deterministic caching, rootless Podman builds with registry layer cache, build-once/promote-by-digest with cosign sign-and-verify, artifact scan gates with SBOMs, tested sub-five-minute rollback, and pipeline telemetry. Integrates with lyra-podman-images, lyra-podman-deploy, lyra-security-supply-chain.
